pageContext.name: Batman™: Unmask the Truth
pageContext.description: All everyone wants to do is unmask you, but they're missing the point. You and I both know I'm looking at the real you right now.   Sideshow and Bill Sienkiewicz Art present the Batman: Unmask the Truth Fine Art Lithograph, a dramatic DC Comics art print featuring heroes and villains from the 2022 film The Batman.  Batman's stern, dark, silhouetted side profile shows the pensive hero as he contemplates his place in Gotham. Far below, a fearsome Batman grabs a criminal by the collar. In contrast, waves of rich green and orange flood the scene as a hopeful Batman, flare raised high, leads his city through the water to safety. Between these three depictions of Vengeance himself are the masked Riddler, a gloomy Bruce Wayne, a nervous Penguin, the resolute Jim Gordon, and the captivating Catwoman. The Riddler's red question mark cypher cuts through these characters, intersecting the piece in the same way Edward Nashton's nefarious game intertwined with all their lives.  Each Batman: Unmask the Truth Fine Art Lithograph is hand signed by Sienkiewicz and includes a Certificate of Authenticity as part of the limited edition of only 150 pieces. Available as an unframed certified archival lithograph print and in a custom framed presentation, this Batman artwork is perfect for fans of the Dark Knight's newest cinematic iteration.  Embrace hope and bring home the Batman: Unmask the Truth Fine Art Print by Bill Sienkiewicz today!
